title: Call: What type of options can be exercised at any time...
summary: Identify American options as exercisable at any time before expiration.
prompt: What type of options can be exercised at any time before expiration?

options.text: American options can be exercised at any time before expiration, while European

solution: American options can be exercised at any time before expiration, while European options can only be exercised at expiration. [[24]]
